title: Banana Oat Pancake Strips
description: Banana Oat Pancake Strips is a cook-once Foody Fam base that separates a gentle baby portion before the adult finish.
steps: Prep oats, banana, and yogurt into baby-safe sizes.
Cook the shared base with olive oil, onion, and low-sodium broth until tender.
Remove the baby portion before adding salt, strong spice, or adult toppings.
Adjust the baby portion to the right texture for age and feeding style.
Finish the adult portion with herbs, acidity, seasoning, and optional cheese or spice.

babyAdaptations.6-8: Blend or mash oats with soft banana until smooth; keep salt-free and serve lukewarm.
babyAdaptations.8-10: Mash softly with tiny pieces of yogurt; keep textures moist and easy to swallow.
babyAdaptations.10-12: Serve soft small pieces or loaded spoon portions, checking that every piece squashes easily.
babyAdaptations.toddler: Serve as small fork-tender bites with mild family seasoning and safe cut sizes.

toddlerAdaptation: Offer toddler portions as soft bites with extra sauce or broth for moisture.

seasoning: Salt after baby portion is removed
steps: Return the adult portion to heat.
Add seasoning and a bright finish.
Serve warm with a simple side.
